name: PVP.trade
description: PVP.trade is a Telegram bot for trading Hyperliquid perpetuals in group chats: members can long or short perps, share alpha, copy or countertrade each other, and use commands for charts, leaderboards, stops, and wallet tracking. Custody uses Turnkey with optional passkey 2FA; funding is USDC on Hyperliquid, Arbitrum, or Solana with bridging after minimum deposits.
